message:
feat(bubbletea): improve custom I/O mode for SSH and headless use

- Skip raw mode enable/disable when custom_io is set
- Add external message channel forwarding for async runtime
- Conditionally query terminal size only when not using custom I/O
- Disable terminal event polling in async loop for custom I/O mode
- Skip window size responses when custom I/O is active

These changes improve compatibility with wish SSH framework and
headless testing scenarios where terminal control is not available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
